name: VR Screw Puzzle: Nut & Bolt
summary: Unleash your mechanical logic in a 3D workshop! Experience the ultimate physics-based challenge in VR with VR Screw Puzzle: Nut & Bolt. Aim, unscrew, and watch metal plates fall as you navigate through intricate layers of nuts and bolts in an immersive environment. With intuitive controller-based interactions and endless levels of brain-teasing fun, master the art of unscrewing and solve every complex puzzle!
